name: Rogueformer
short_description: Rogueformer is a 2D, procedurally generated, platformer where a magical, living ice cube develops a range of unique perks that help it survive in a cruel, destructible environment, filled with all sorts of foes and curses.
detailed_description:
Rogueformer is a 2D roguelite, platformer with procedurally generated, fully destructible environment and a wide range of challenges you run in along the way, including different monsters, randomized environmental events, varying terrain and curses, curses and of course - more curses! Choose your own journey - whether to go up or down, build upon this or that, win big or lose big, and of course - whether to kill or be killed!

Main features:

  • 250+ Perks - Choose a variety of hundreds of perks present in the game, that both help you overcome your greatest challenges or, on the contrary, sabotage your journey! They can act in various ways, affecting the generation of the world, it's inhabitants and yourself, from melting the whole world down into lava, to making you, our beloved player, visually impaired!

  • Shooting - Shoot through hordes of enemies to get past them, gain some money, or just for the sake of 'why not'!

  • 50+ Consumable Items - Collect a wide range of consumable items, varying from Health-Ups and Reloads, all the way to Potions and Bombs!

  • 30+ Throwables - Hurl around your Bombs and Potions that all have unique effects, such as blowing up in a cloud of webs to slow down your enemies or that sets the whole world on fire!

  • 30+ Orbitals - Collect various orbital familiars, that both help you or hinder your progress!

  • Rich Environment with 12+ Locations - Explore more than a dozen different regions in the game, with varying game mechanics surrounding them, and a specific fauna for each one of them! Experience a wide range of traveling destinations, from the boiling depths of hell, all the way up to a difficult to traverse summit of a mountain!

  • Exciting Fauna with 50+ Unique Foes - Get to know the inhabitants of this world, starting from little birds trying to run away from you, and ending with a big bang of a kamikaze drone!
